query: SELECT id, reportType, location, submitterName, reportDate, JSON_EXTRACT(data, '$.clientName') as clientName FROM report_submissions WHERE location = 'sales' AND reportType IN ('bagel-orders', 'Bagel Orders') ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10;
